extension.description:
[COLOR white]* We will not revoke our Trakt or TMDb keys * We will not block any third party apps or skins * No politics * NO DRAMA!
I am grateful to Tikipeter and his various pseudonyms and aliases for creating and maintaining Fen and FenLight/FenLightAM.
Many thanks to those who assisted with the TMDb Helper patch and restoring the icons and encouraged me to release Mando.[/COLOR]
extension.disclaimer: [COLOR white]The author of this add-on does not host any content and has no affiliation with the content providers[/COLOR]
extension.news: [COLOR white]Check the Changelog in Tools > Changelog & Log Utils[/COLOR]
